message:
fix(installer): prevent gum from parsing arrow prefix as flag

The info() function passed "-> $*" to gum style, which caused gum to
interpret the leading dash in "->" as a flag, printing help output
and erroring with "unknown flag ->". Adding "--" (POSIX end-of-options)
before the text argument ensures gum treats it as content to style.

Closes #2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -63,7 +63,7 @@ log() { [ "$QUIET" -eq 1 ] && return 0; echo -e "$@"; }
 info() {
   [ "$QUIET" -eq 1 ] && return 0
   if [ "$HAS_GUM" -eq 1 ] && [ "$NO_GUM" -eq 0 ]; then
-    gum style --foreground 39 "-> $*"
+    gum style --foreground 39 -- "-> $*"
   else
     echo -e "\033[0;34m->\033[0m $*"
   fi
